metadata.description: Coexistence / empowerment investors — commercial-plus-humanitarian funds seeking returns and impact. Hand-curated from primary sources (recon 2026-07-07).
metadata.default_keywords: impact, coexistence, empowerment, blended finance, social objective

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Early-stage ICT founders in the West Bank building internet, mobile and software companies, with a path to international markets.
watchlist.notes: First VC fund for Palestinian tech ($30M). Seed to post-Series A. Thesis: back Palestinian ICT founders and assist them accessing international markets. Explicit social objective of revitalizing distressed regions, increasing economic opportunity and creating jobs. Backed by EIB, Cisco, Soros Economic Development Fund, Google. Portfolio: Freightos, Yamsafer, WebTeb.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Early-stage Arab entrepreneurs in Israel with high-growth potential.
watchlist.notes: Haifa-based VC empowering high-potential Arab founders in Israel. Early-stage capital (Takwin 1 and Takwin 2, ~$80M). Thesis: economic success stories for Arab founders bolster Startup Nation socially and economically. Co-founded with Chemi Peres (Pitango) and Erel Margalit (JVP).

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Early-stage ventures equally owned by Israeli and Palestinian co-founders.
watchlist.notes: Venture builder creating startups equally owned by Israeli and Palestinian entrepreneurs. Coexistence through venture creation and technological innovation. Early-stage. Backs founders who have come together despite the political reality, arguing they show resilience.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Growth capital for UK businesses with a measurable social-impact objective.
watchlist.notes: UK impact investor. Growth-stage risk capital (£500k to £5M) for businesses improving the lives of people in underserved communities. Empowerment and inclusion thesis, London-based.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Long-term growth capital for social enterprises with a social-impact objective.
watchlist.notes: UK social-impact investor. Long-term growth capital for social enterprises making sustainable improvements to the lives of people in underserved communities. Empowerment focus, London-based.
